text.title: Generative UI Design Spec Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the generative-ui-design methodology.

example.title: On-demand dashboard generator
example.narrative: User asks 'show me my Q2 revenue by region' → LLM emits a dashboard tree (Cards, Charts, Tables) constrained by ui-grammar.json. Fallback: static three-card layout if grammar violation. Eval suite covers 35 intents incl. adversarial 'show me competitor revenue' (refuses).
example.artifact: generative-spec.md describing grammar + fallback + eval + safety guardrails.
